source: OSide vocab.md — performance directions for Soul Cast actors and character prompting

micro_expressions.name: Suppressed Smile
micro_expressions.description: Fighting back a grin, corner of mouth twitching

micro_expressions.name: Quiet Devastation
micro_expressions.description: Eyes glassy, jaw tight, holding it together

micro_expressions.name: Cold Calculation
micro_expressions.description: Eyes scanning, no emotional leakage, clinical

micro_expressions.name: Frozen Shock
micro_expressions.description: Mouth slightly open, eyes fixed, body still

micro_expressions.name: Simmering Rage
micro_expressions.description: Clenched jaw, flared nostrils, steady stare

micro_expressions.name: Vulnerable Openness
micro_expressions.description: Soft eyes, slightly parted lips, unguarded
